title: Extra Space Storage 2025 Form 10-K
publisher: Extra Space Storage / U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
note: Primary source for 2025 store footprint, third-party management scale, Life Storage integration, revenue, net income, IPO date, and risk disclosures.

title: Extra Space Storage Investor Relations Corporate Overview
note: Investor-relations profile confirming the company as a self-administered and self-managed REIT and S&P 500 member offering storage units across the country.

title: Extra Space Storage Official Website
note: Consumer-facing source for the company's national self-storage offering, location scale, customer positioning, and storage-unit search experience.

title: Storage 101: The Ultimate Guide to Self Storage
note: Product source for storage-unit access types, common uses, security features, lease flexibility, vehicle storage, and insurance requirements.

title: Business & Commercial Storage
note: Product source for Extra Space's business-storage use cases, including inventory, documents, equipment, vehicles, office space, warehouse storage, and deliveries.

title: Third-Party Self Storage Management: Management Plus
note: Product source for Extra Space's third-party management platform, partner positioning, property count, and operating-system claims.

title: Extra Space Storage Sustainability
note: Source for 2025 sustainability claims, including solar investment, solar production, and share of REIT-owned facilities with solar systems.

title: Extra Space Storage Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for EXR's June 2026 market capitalization, share price, and category context.

title: Extra Space Storage Statistics & Valuation
note: Market-data source for market capitalization, shares outstanding, trailing P/E, price/FFO, TTM revenue, TTM net income, and margin context.

title: Sharetribe Marketplace Software
note: Marketplace software source used as an enabling primitive for local storage marketplaces, rental marketplaces, listings, payments, transaction flows, and custom marketplace development.

title: Sharetribe Go GitHub Repository
note: Source-available marketplace codebase reference used to evaluate reuse potential and limitations of Sharetribe-based alternatives.

title: OpenStreetMap About
note: Open geospatial data source for local inventory discovery, address context, and community-maintained maps in federated storage marketplace concepts.

title: openMAINT Property & Facility Management
note: Open-source property and facility management system source for evaluating independent self-storage operations and cooperative facility management alternatives.

title: OpenADR Frequently Asked Questions
note: Technical source for open, interoperable automated demand-response and distributed-energy coordination primitives used in the solar-backed storage microfacility concept.
